name_for_human: S&P Global / Capital IQ Financial Data
description_for_human: Access financial data, credit ratings, debt schedules, industry analysis, and ESG scores from S&P Global and Capital IQ.
description_for_model: Use this plugin to retrieve financial statements, credit ratings, debt schedules, industry analysis, ESG scores, company profiles, and earnings transcripts from S&P Global / Capital IQ. Best for credit analysis, debt structure review, and industry-level insights.

functions.name: get_financials
functions.description: Retrieve financial statements and data from S&P Capital IQ.

statement_type.description: Type of financial statement: income_statement, balance_sheet, or cash_flow

functions.name: get_credit_rating
functions.description: Retrieve S&P credit ratings and outlook for a company or security.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol or issuer identifier (e.g., AAPL, MSFT)

rating_type.description: Type of rating: issuer, issue, or all

include_history.description: Whether to include rating history (default: false)

functions.name: get_debt_schedule
functions.description: Retrieve detailed debt schedule including maturities, interest rates, and covenants.

as_of_date.description: Date for debt schedule snapshot in ISO format (e.g., 2024-12-31)

include_covenants.description: Whether to include covenant details (default: false)

functions.name: get_industry_analysis
functions.description: Retrieve industry-level analysis including market size, growth trends, and competitive landscape.

industry.description: Industry name or GICS code (e.g., Software, 45103010)

region.description: Geographic region: global, north_america, europe, asia_pacific

metrics.description: Specific metrics to retrieve (e.g., market_size, growth_rate, concentration)

functions.name: get_esg_scores
functions.description: Retrieve ESG (Environmental, Social, Governance) scores and assessments.

framework.description: ESG framework: sp_global, sasb, tcfd, or all

include_history.description: Whether to include historical ESG scores (default: false)

functions.name: get_company_profile
functions.description: Retrieve detailed company profile from Capital IQ including business description, segments, and key personnel.

include_segments.description: Whether to include business segment details (default: true)

include_executives.description: Whether to include executive/management information (default: true)

functions.name: get_earnings_transcripts
functions.description: Retrieve earnings call transcripts including Q&A sections.

section.description: Transcript section: prepared_remarks, qa, or full

functions.name: get_deal_analytics
functions.description: Retrieve M&A deal analytics including valuation multiples, premiums, and comparable transaction analysis.

ticker.description: Target company ticker symbol (e.g., AAPL, MSFT)

sector.description: Filter by industry sector (e.g., Technology, Healthcare)

min_deal_value.description: Minimum deal value in millions USD

deal_status.description: Deal status filter: completed, pending, or all
